title: Trabajo y estudio
communication_goal: Usar trabajo y estudio en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to trabajo y estudio.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla trabajo y estudio mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: What do you do?
lessons.objective: Hablar de ocupaciones, estudios y lugares básicos de trabajo o aprendizaje.

activities.prompt: A person who teaches students is a ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Teacher es profesor o profesora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la ocupación relacionada con enseñar.

activities.prompt: I study at a ___.
activities.feedback_correct: University es una institución de estudios superiores.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige un lugar donde estudias.

activities.prompt: You want to ask about someone's job.
activities.feedback_correct: What do you do? pregunta por ocupación o actividad principal.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la pregunta relacionada con trabajo o estudios.

activities.instruction: Une la ocupación con el lugar probable.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas profesiones, estudios y lugares.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa dónde realiza normalmente su actividad cada persona.

activities.prompt: a / am / I / student
activities.feedback_correct: Usamos I am a/an para decir ocupación o identidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I am y coloca a antes de student.

activities.prompt: My name is Helen. I am a nurse, and I work at a hospital. My brother is a student at a university.
activities.question: Where does Helen work?
activities.feedback_correct: Helen dice I work at a hospital.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la información relacionada con Helen, no con su hermano.

activities.prompt: I am a ___. I work at ___. I study ___. I like my work or studies because ___.
evaluation_criteria: natural I am and I work
activities.feedback_correct: Tu información sobre trabajo o estudios se entiende claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica I am a, I work at y I study como frases completas.

activities.prompt: Rosa is a teacher at a primary school. David is an engineer in a small office. Nina studies biology at college.
activities.question: Who studies biology?
activities.feedback_correct: El perfil dice Nina studies biology.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración que contiene studies.

activities.instruction: Escribe tu perfil académico o laboral.
activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about your job or studies, workplace or school, schedule, tasks, and one thing you like.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar tu situación laboral o académica básica.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa I am, I work, I study y I like con información concreta.

activities.prompt: Meet the AI at work or school. Introduce yourself, ask what it does, compare schedules, and discuss one shared task.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes iniciar una conversación sobre trabajo o estudios.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA adapta el contexto a trabajo o escuela y refuerza el vocabulario necesario.

lessons.title: Tasks and schedules
lessons.objective: Describir tareas habituales, horarios y responsabilidades de trabajo o estudio.

activities.prompt: A student ___ notes in class.
activities.feedback_correct: Take notes es la expresión natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa el verbo que forma take notes.

activities.prompt: I ___ emails at work.
activities.feedback_correct: Answer emails significa responder correos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una tarea de oficina relacionada con emails.

activities.prompt: She ___ meetings on Mondays.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she, have cambia a has.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la tercera persona singular de have.

activities.instruction: Une la actividad con el lugar.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas tareas con contextos cotidianos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa dónde ocurre normalmente cada actividad.

activities.prompt: at nine / starts / my class
activities.feedback_correct: La frase usa sujeto, verbo y hora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca My class al principio y starts antes de at nine.

activities.prompt: I start work at eight. I answer emails in the morning, have a meeting at ten, and help customers in the afternoon.
activities.question: When does the speaker help customers?
activities.feedback_correct: La tarea ocurre in the afternoon.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la parte final de la descripción.

activities.prompt: I start at ___. I answer emails in the morning. I have a meeting at ___. I finish at ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu horario de tareas se entiende con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica answer emails y have a meeting como grupos completos.

activities.prompt: Leo studies from nine to one. He attends English class, takes notes, and asks questions. In the afternoon, he does homework at the library.
activities.question: Where does Leo do homework?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice at the library.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la actividad de la tarde.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about your work or study day. Include six tasks and the time for three of them.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes describir responsabilidades y horarios.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa start, finish, have, do y answer con el sujeto correcto.

activities.instruction: Explica tus tareas a la IA.
activities.prompt: Tell the AI about your daily tasks, compare responsibilities, and agree on who will do one shared task.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de tareas y coordinar responsabilidades básicas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA convierte tus actividades en un horario y practica los verbos necesarios.

lessons.title: Ask for help and information
lessons.objective: Pedir ayuda, instrucciones e información básica en un entorno de trabajo o estudio.

activities.prompt: You do not understand the task.
activities.feedback_correct: Es una petición cortés de ayuda.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la frase relacionada con una tarea difícil.

activities.prompt: ___ I use this computer?
activities.feedback_correct: Can I...? pregunta si tienes permiso o posibilidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa Can para pedir permiso de forma sencilla.

activities.prompt: Where is the meeting room?
options: It is next to the office.
activities.correct_answer: It is next to the office.
activities.feedback_correct: La pregunta pide una ubicación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta con un lugar.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con su función.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces estrategias útiles para aprender y trabajar.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica qué información necesitas en cada situación.

activities.prompt: you / Could / explain / this / please
activities.feedback_correct: Could you...? forma una petición cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Could you y coloca please al final.

activities.prompt: Student: Excuse me, could you explain this question? Teacher: Sure. Read the first sentence and underline the verb.
activities.question: What should the student underline?
activities.feedback_correct: El profesor dice underline the verb.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la instrucción después de Read the first sentence.

activities.prompt: Could you help me, please? Can I ask a question? Could you repeat that? Thank you.
activities.feedback_correct: Tus peticiones son claras y educadas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sube ligeramente la entonación en las preguntas y no pronuncies could como good.

activities.prompt: Hi Ana, Could you send me the homework, please? I do not understand exercise three. Can you explain it tomorrow? Thanks, Luis.
activities.question: What does Luis not understand?
activities.feedback_correct: Luis dice I do not understand exercise three.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la frase después de understand.

activities.prompt: Write six polite requests for work or study. Include help, repetition, permission, location, meaning, and an explanation.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes pedir información y ayuda de forma adecuada.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa Could you...? para pedir ayuda o repetición y Can I...? para permiso.

activities.instruction: Resuelve una tarea con la IA.
activities.prompt: You are new at work or school. Ask the AI for help, permission, repetition, and an explanation until you can complete the task.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes pedir ayuda y mantener la comunicación cuando algo no está claro.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA ajusta su explicación y practica la petición que necesites.

lessons.title: A productive day
lessons.objective: Integrar ocupaciones, tareas, horarios y peticiones para desenvolverse en una situación de trabajo o estudio.

activities.prompt: Which sentence is correct?
options: She is start work at eight.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos starts en presente simple.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la forma de tercera persona singular.

activities.prompt: You need more time for a task.
options: Could I have more time, please?
activities.correct_answer: Could I have more time, please?
activities.feedback_correct: Es una petición cortés para solicitar tiempo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una pregunta que pida algo de forma educada.

activities.prompt: I work ___ an office.
activities.feedback_correct: Decimos work in an office.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la preposición natural con office.

activities.prompt: usually / I / finish / at five / work
activities.correct_answer: I usually finish work at five.
activities.feedback_correct: Usually va antes del verbo finish.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca I primero, usually antes de finish y la hora al final.

activities.instruction: Une el problema con la solución comunicativa.

pairs.left: No sabes la hora de una reunión.

activities.feedback_correct: Eliges una estrategia funcional para cada problema.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa si necesitas explicación, permiso, hora o ubicación.

activities.instruction: Escucha el plan de trabajo y responde.
activities.prompt: Maria starts work at nine. First, she checks her emails. At ten, she has a meeting. After lunch, she helps customers. She finishes at five.
activities.question: What does Maria do after lunch?
activities.feedback_correct: Después de lunch, she helps customers.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la acción después de After lunch.

activities.instruction: Graba tu presentación profesional o académica.
activities.prompt: I am a ___. I work or study at ___. I start at ___. I usually ___. Could you help me with ___, please?
activities.feedback_correct: Presentas tu situación y haces una petición clara.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica I usually y Could you...? con pausas naturales.

activities.prompt: Jorge works in a hotel. He starts at seven, checks reservations, and helps guests. At noon, he has lunch. In the afternoon, he answers emails and finishes at three.
activities.question: What does Jorge check?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice checks reservations.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la primera tarea después de starts at seven.

activities.prompt: Write a twelve-sentence work or study plan with occupation, location, schedule, tasks, breaks, one difficulty, and two polite requests.

activities.instruction: Completa tu primer día con la IA.
activities.prompt: It is your first day at a new job or school. Introduce yourself, ask about the schedule and tasks, request help, and summarize your plan at the end.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes desenvolverte en una situación inicial de trabajo o estudio.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA adapta las instrucciones y te ayuda a repetir los puntos débiles.
